name: context-engine
description: Connect Claude Desktop to the local Context Engine broker.
long_description: Runs locally in Claude Desktop and forwards MCP tool calls to Context Engine on your machine. Use this when Context Engine is running locally and you want Claude Desktop to access skills, memory, and index status without an HTTPS tunnel.

ce_host.title: Context Engine Host
ce_host.description: Host where the local Context Engine HTTP server is listening.

ce_port.title: Context Engine Port
ce_port.description: Port the local Context Engine HTTP server is bound to.

tools.name: context_engine_search
tools.description: Search indexed Context Engine skill chunks.

tools.name: context_engine_list_skills
tools.description: List skills discovered by Context Engine.

tools.name: context_engine_get_skill
tools.description: Fetch the full body of a Context Engine skill.

tools.name: context_engine_status
tools.description: Report the Context Engine vector index status.

tools.name: context_engine_handoffs
tools.description: List active Context Engine handoffs for resuming in-flight threads, with bounded commit timelines for repo-bound handoffs.

tools.name: context_engine_sync_project_handoff
tools.description: Sync <repo>/.context-engine/handoff.md into Context Engine's managed handoff store.
